subject: [PATCH v3 4/4] testing: add dontcache-bench local filesystem benchmark suite

2026-04-26.patch_summary: This patch adds a new benchmark suite called 'dontcache-bench' to test the IOCB_DONTCACHE functionality on local filesystems using fio's io_uring engine and RWF_DONTCACHE flag. The suite includes various job files for different I/O patterns, such as sequential reads and writes, random reads and writes, and latency measurements. It also includes scripts to run and parse the benchmark results. This patch aims to provide a comprehensive testing framework for IOCB_DONTCACHE on local filesystems.
